tasks.instruction: Create a new agility-focused dog profile for a herding-breed youngster with a 120–150 word biography, exactly three agility-training activity tags, and visibility limited to club members.

tasks.instruction: Edit one of your dog's yearbook ads so it uses the least expensive half-page layout costing at most $60, contains at least 100 words of text, has no paid add-ons that push the total above $60, is placed in a standard tribute section, and uses online-only proofing.

tasks.instruction: Create a new two-dog feature spread for two of your existing dogs using the lowest-priced layout that supports exactly two dogs with space for at least 200 words of text, assign it to a family/companions-style section, and write at least 200 words.

tasks.instruction: For one of your agility dogs, add four achievements dated between 2020 and 2024 including at least two Agility and two Obedience events, then filter that dog’s achievements list to 2020–2024 and sort the results by date from oldest to newest.

tasks.instruction: For a pending dog-profile proof, add one editor-visible revision comment and one private note, then set the decision to 'Approve with Changes' and enable auto-approval if there is no editor response within 3 days.

tasks.instruction: Order three copies of the 2025 edition of the club yearbook with softcover binding, choose the lowest-priced shipping option under $10, and select a pay-later invoice payment method.

tasks.instruction: From your dog profiles list, mark only profiles with biographies of at least 80 words as Final, leave shorter ones as Draft, and then use bulk actions to lock only the Final profiles.
